title: Thathi Thaavum Paper Naan lyrics -Boss Engira Baskaran songs lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Karthik 
Song: Thathi Thaavum Paper Naan
Movie: Boss Engira Baskaran 
Lyrics : Na Muthukumar

Thathi thaavum paper naan
Ennai boata pola senjaale
Kick yethi yethithaan
Ennai kavuthaale
Inku pona penna naan
Vandhu wine-a oothi ponale
Mappu yethi yethithaan
Mella odhachaale

Enna paduren enna psesuren
Ennaku puriya-villai
Engu pogiren enna pannuren
Ennaku theriya-villai

Unsondham naan en anbu nee
Un mummy en anti-ee
Un sister-um en brother-pol
Endrume naan vazhalam va va

Sattai packet-il vaikira
Cigaratte packet-ah maarura
Heart-u pakkathil sellama
Ceendura-aahhhh

College poyum therala
Knowledge edhuvum aerala
Marriage panna thevala
Maane udane va

Thathi thaavum paper naan
Ennai boata pola senjaale
Kick yethi yethithaan
Ennai kavuthaale
Inku pona penna naan
Vandhu wine-a oothi ponale
Mappu yethi yethithaan
Mella odhachaale
Town-nu bus-ula ariye
Ticket vangi ne neetuna
Vethu ticket-um lottery aagume

England-huku raniya
English ne pesina
ABCD-a nesikka thonume
Incomeing calluku kasuilla
Outgoing callukum kasuilla
Un number thavira pesala
Maane udane vaa..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a playful and carefree attitude, celebrating life's joyful moments.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Boss Engira Baskaran, this song highlights the protagonist's fun-loving nature and his interactions with friends.

Who is the singer and music director?

The song is sung by Karthik and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 29, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thathi Thaavum Paper Naan, the protagonist expresses a carefree and joyous attitude, reflecting the lighthearted moments in Boss Engira Baskaran. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties. The song showcases the vibrant energy of youth and friendship, resonating with anyone looking to enjoy life. Overall, it encapsulates the essence of fun and camaraderie, leaving listeners with a smile.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thathi Thaavum Paper Naan from Boss Engira Baskaran is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Karthik's lively vocals and Yuvan's catchy composition, this song is bound to get you on your feet. Dive into the fun and carefree vibe that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: I am like a paper that flutters in the wind. When I kick, it feels like I'm being hit. When I go to a girl, I pour out wine. It feels like I'm being marked. Slowly, I run away.
What am I singing, what am I saying? I don't understand. Where am I going, what am I doing? I don't know.
You are my love, I am yours. My mom is my aunt. My sister and my brother too. I will live like this, come on.
Putting a cigarette in a packet, changing it to a heart. Without selling it, just keeping it close.
The hero drives a Honda, just like a hero. He gives a zero next to him. It feels like a joke.
When I go to college, I don't know anything. I don't know anything about knowledge. No need to get married right away.

I am like a paper that flutters in the wind. When I kick, it feels like I'm being hit. When I go to a girl, I pour out wine. It feels like I'm being marked. Slowly, I run away. If you buy a ticket on the bus in town, it might turn into a lottery ticket.

When I go to England, I feel like I can speak English. I can recognize ABCD. Incoming calls cost money, and outgoing calls too. Except for your number, I don't talk to anyone. No need to come right away.
I am like a paper that flutters in the wind...
